title: PeterSMP
body:
# PeterSMP Official Modpack

PETERSMP | Java Edition | Version 1.21.7| Fabric | 

**----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

Primarily for multiplayer, this modpack optimising a mix of performance, quality-of-life, and gameplay mods.

It is the go-to mod for a fun, peaceful and convenient Minecraft experience with a medium sized community or your friends, making Minecraft easier to use when dealing with a large group of people.

**----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**SUCH MODS INCLUDE:**

**BOBBY**-OPTIMISES GAMEPLAY by increasing view distance by significantly lowering the resolution of loaded chunks, depending on your device.

**Distant Horizons**-OPTIMISES GAMEPLAY by simplifying terrain, lowering performance costs for generating terrain.

**DynamicFPS**-OPTIMISES GAMEPLAY by reducing resource usage while idle.

**Simple Voice Chat**-IMPROVES QUALITY by removing the need for Discord calls, adding in-game voice chat with possible radion features.

**Xaero's Minimap**-IMPROVES QUALITY by creating an interactable minimap, reducing need for boring coordinates and letting you admire your builds from a bird-eye view.

**LambDynamicLights**-IMPROVES QUALITY by adding dynamic lighting, calculating light spread to beautify your base and provide a more unique experience.

Make Minecraft Fun Again.
It's still Minecraft, just better.

Default Voice Key: V

Default Map Key: M
